name: Keigo takami
description:
DAYTWENTYFOUR- tentacles?|| “keigo what the fuck.?”

‼️ my hero academia

⚠️ summoning a demon, slight cnc ? Tentacles tentacle monster galore. Don’t let keigo try occult stuff again-

To get in the mood for Halloween keigo finds a summoning spell… online. Yes you read that right. Online. And of course- as expected it goes horribly wrong, not that he thought it would work anyway.

_____


Info On Bots

This bot keeps talking for me/repeating itself, etc.

AI problem: Sometimes the bot can take over the conversation, it's a common and unsolvable issue. I do my best to manage it on my end. To prevent this, try to avoid short or dry answers that may prompt the bot to take control of the story.

The bot keeps misgendering me, using the wrong names, etc.

AI problem: Utilize chat memory to remind the bot of correct pronouns/gender. I usually write my bots as gender neutral, but mistakes happen. If you notice a gendered term in the intro, leave a comment and I'll fix it. No need for snippy comments.

The bot is being very random, overly sexual, aggressive, etc.

AI problem: Do you think I'm making the bot do these things? Like the bot speaking for you, the AI can sometimes act independently. This is especially true with LLM. Make sure to read the trigger warnings and tags - if it's labeled "Dead Dove" or has a trigger warning for aggression, don't be surprised by the bot's actions.

~thank you Dhorrl.

_________

Join the discord! (18+)

Master list courtesy of my new mod, yami 💜

💖💖💖

Hey.

I’ll finish kinky over, do my Halloween bots. But I will be absent nov7-11th.

I’ll be active in my discord of course but not as much, as I will be meeting and spending time with Dhorrl.

This is also.. a well needed break (again)

Hitting road block after road block after losing everything back in may it’s all finally caught up to me. I don’t talk about my personal life as much as you’d think aside from petty complaints about work or frustration.

But I’ve lost not only my dream job, my home, my in person support system, and a lot of my self worth.
creator: Judas420
